THE FOOT
STRONG FEET. BETTER DAYS.
Check daily. Stay healthy. Keep moving.
Brand Asset Kit
OpenDiabetic.com
Meet the mascot
The Character
Freddy is a friendly, energetic foot mascot who champions daily foot care. He is always upbeat, always moving, and never without his stars-and-stripes headband and white Converse Chuck Taylors.
Character views
Character views — with kicks

Badge, stacked, and horizontal lockups. Use the circular badge or F icon for avatars and app tiles.

Voice & taglines
How Freddy Talks
Strong Feet. Better Days.
Primary tagline.
Check Your Feet Every Day!
Call to action.
Happy Feet. Happy You.
Warm sign-off.
Upbeat, encouraging, and never clinical. Freddy speaks in short, active sentences, celebrates small wins, and always ties fun back to foot health.
Sound
Freddy’s Voice
The voice — ElevenLabs
Chris
Charming, Down-to-Earth
American male, mid-40s dad energy — upbeat, playful, a touch dry, never clinical. One Freddy, one voice, every surface. Distinct from the Brian narrator voice.
voice_id iP95p4xoKVk53GoZ742B eleven_v3 stability 0.45 style 0.40
